concerns.text: FR-008 requires the system to 'halt' if core constructs are missing. Task T017 ('Implement validation logic...') lacks explicit instruction to enforce the exit/halt behavior, risking a silent failure instead of the required stop.

FR-009 mandates a fallback to a 'reduced model' if missing covariates cause >10% drop. Task T016 ('missing data handling... listwise deletion or mean imputation') omits the conditional logic to switch models, leaving the requirement unimplemented.

Constitution I (Reproducibility) and Plan.md require pinning random seeds in code. Task T008 only configures environment variables but lacks a specific task to enforce seed usage within the DGP, modeling, and bootstrapping functions themselves.

SC-004 requires flagging instability if 95% CI crosses zero in >50% of thresholds. Task T030 mentions flagging instability but does not explicitly include the calculation of the '50% of swept thresholds' metric required to satisfy the success criterion.
